Common_Genes: GST (glutathione S-transferase, involved in anthocyanin transport to vacuole)
PAT (putative anthocyanin transporter, involved in anthocyanin transport to vacuole)
Regulation_Genes: Del (Delila, bHLH transcription factor from Antirrhinum majus)
Ros1 (Rosea1, MYB-related transcription factor from Antirrhinum majus)
Title: Enrichment of tomato fruit with health-promoting anthocyanins by expression of select transcription factors
